name: Cartier Resources Inc.
description: Cartier Resources Inc. is a Canada-based exploration stage company. The Company is engaged in the acquisition and exploration of mining properties in Quebec, Canada. Its projects include Chimo Mine, Benoist, Fenton, Wilson, and Cadillac Extension. The Chimo Mine property is located approximately 45 kilometers east of Val-d'Or, Quebec. The Benoist property is located approximately 65 kilometers northeast of Lebel-sur-Quevillon, Quebec. The Fenton property is located approximately 50 kilometers southwest of Chapais, Quebec. The Wilson property is located approximately 15 kilometers east of Lebel-sur-Quevillon, Quebec.
